title: Steve's Simple Storage
description: A Minecraft mod that adds a scalable, multiblock storage system where players can store millions of items in a single system with built-in   crafting, sorting, searching, automation, and security features.
body:
Steve's Simple Storage, originally a fork of EZStorage 2, introduces a storage system that scales and evolves as players progress. Want to put 100,000 Cobblestone in 1 slot? No problem. Blocks in the mod can add a search bar, a crafting grid, additional storage, external access, security, and more. Also includes JEI integration for 1-click crafting from the system's internal inventory!

On top of the original functionality, this mod now adds support for configuration, so you can update the capacity values of each of the storage blocks, enable and disable features in the mod and even enable or disable JEI integration!

If you'd like to see additional features or changes you can request them via the repository in [GitHub](https://github.com/scuba10steve/steves-simple-storage/issues/new).  Please try to not create a duplicate if a similar feature request already exists.

If you want to see the original mod that this was forked from/inspired by you can visit here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ezstorage-2

For more information you can visit here: https://github.com/scuba10steve/steves-simple-storage/blob/main/README.md
